历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 5623, in 2024 approximately 6099, and in 2025 approximately 4753. The rankings have fluctuated significantly over the past three years, with a shift of about 476 places backward in 2024 compared to 2023, and a shift of about 1346 places forward in 2025 compared to 2024, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing and then increasing; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4753; the university's enrollment plan for science in Xinjiang was 40 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 37 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction trend; the plan for 2026 increases to 41, an expansion of about 10.8% compared to 2025, which is relatively significant and helps alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Rankings: 65th in 2021 → 59th in 2022 → 60th in 2023 → 55th in 2024 → 51st in 2025 → 52nd in 2026, showing a steady upward trend overall, stabilizing around 50th in recent years, with continuously improving comprehensive strength and recognition; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative (school management or response incidents), but no negative records related to Jiangnan University were found in the reputation data from 2024 to 2026; Douyin popularity ranking is 71st, rated as "average", with a comprehensive popularity of about 380,000, which is at a medium-low level among 211 universities, with low attention on short video platforms, showing no obvious signal of application heat; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, two A+ disciplines are at the top level nationwide; flagship majors such as Food Science and Engineering, Light Chemical Engineering, and Textile Engineering directly correspond to the enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended due to social heat; Jiangnan University offers Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Internet of Things Engineering, etc., aligning with current popular directions; in 2025, there were 52,538 science candidates in Xinjiang, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 238,000 (estimated at about 163,000 science candidates based on the 2025 science proportion of 68.6%), with a significant increase in candidate scale, intensifying competition; the first batch of science undergraduate in Xinjiang: 396 points in 2023 → 390 points in 2024 → 421 points in 2025, with a clear rebound in 2025; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, part of the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has a certain regional appeal to Xinjiang candidates; the university's enrollment number for science in Xinjiang is relatively small (about 37-41 people), representing a medium scale among cross-provincial enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4753, an expansion of about 10.8% in 2026 (direction of increasing ranking numbers), a significant increase in the scale of science candidates in Xinjiang (intensified competition, direction of increasing ranking numbers), a steady rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (enhanced attractiveness, direction of decreasing ranking numbers), and sustained heat in engineering majors. Considering that the increase in candidate scale has a stronger effect on intensifying competition than the alleviating effect of expansion, as well as the attractiveness of the university's rising ranking and advantageous disciplines, the baseline ranking is slightly shifted upward by 50 places. The predicted minimum admission ranking for science in 2026 is approximately 5111, with a fluctuation range of 4611 to 5611.
